title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud SQL presentation covering new features for MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server including AI-driven automated health management, fleet-wide insights, and Database Migration Service for cloud transitions. Focus is on performance, high availability, and security improvements.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video reviews recent Cloud SQL updates across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, organized around performance, high availability, and security. Featured capabilities include AI-driven automated health management, fleet-wide insights for monitoring across instances, and Database Migration Service for moving workloads to the cloud. The session ties these features to workflow automation, health monitoring, and cost management for managed relational databases.
